description: Merges consecutive messages with the same role into a single message. Tool messages and assistant messages with tool_calls are never merged to preserve tool call sequences.

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: Array of message objects to merge

inputs.name: separator
inputs.description: String to join merged content with

outputs.name: messages
outputs.description: Array of messages with consecutive same-role messages merged

outputs.name: merged_count
outputs.description: Number of messages that were merged into others
